heading: Ready Reserve
label: 10142 Ready Reserve
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 268(a) of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(2)(A)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The Ready Reserve consists of units or Reserves, or both, liable for active duty as provided in sections 12301 and 12302 of this title.

children.label: b
children.text: The authorized strength of the Ready Reserve is 2,900,000.
